privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic Android project named TaskMaster at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/TaskMaster. It simulates a merge conflict scenario where two Git branches modify the same files. The main branch adds the MPAndroidChart library (a real Android charting library by PhilJay, accessed via com.github.PhilJay:MPAndroidChart) and includes a LineChart component (class: com.github.mikephil.charting.charts.LineChart). The feature branch adds Retrofit (a real HTTP client library by Square, accessed via com.squareup.retrofit2:retrofit) and a login form LinearLayout (with ID: @+id/login_container). The task requires resolving the conflicts while preserving work from both branches, ensuring no git conflict markers remain (<<<<<<<, =======, >>>>>>>), and the project builds successfully.
